team.date_founded: Founded on tilted, sideways-spinning Uranus, where nothing is quite oriented the way it should be — including the football.
team.number_of_fans: Around 19 million, eccentric and devoted, who never know what they'll get.
team.badge: A planet tipped fully on its side, a serpentine sidewinder coiled around it.
team.home_kit: Turquoise and white with a diagonal, off-kilter slash across the body.
team.away_kit: Pale ice-cyan with crooked, sideways striping.
team.third_kit: Deep teal with a tilted, asymmetric crest.
team.history: Uranus Sidewinders are the league's wild card. Raised on a world that spins on its side, they play unpredictable, lopsided, attacking football that bewilders opponents and, frequently, themselves. On their day they are dazzling; on their off day, chaos — and no one, least of all them, can predict which it will be.
team.club_culture: Eccentric, attacking, and gloriously unpredictable. The Tilt would rather entertain than be safe.
team.political_leaning: Frontier-eccentric — contrarian and allergic to convention.
trophy_cabinet: A scattering of giant-killings and a few baffling collapses
legends: Skew Vantel — the winger who scored from impossible angles no one else would try
achievements: Most goals from unconventional positions in the league

stadium.date_built: Built on the tilted polar plains, its stands set at deliberately odd angles.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the eccentric independent guilds of the tilted world.
stadium.pitch_size: Asymmetric within the rules — wider on one flank than the other, to the visitors' confusion.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the long, strange Uranian seasons.
stadium.bio: The Tilted Field disorients before kickoff: the stands lean, the sightlines are wrong, and the home side's lopsided football only deepens the confusion. Visitors rarely feel settled here.

training_facility.date_built: A professional institute built, naturally, at an angle.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the world's independent-minded guilds.
training_facility.bio: The Sideways Athletic Institute drills the unconventional — overloads, switches, and lateral movement designed to pull defences out of shape. Orthodoxy is gently discouraged.

manager.appearance: Animated and quirky, gestures constantly, dresses with deliberate mismatch.
manager.bio: Axis Brennan is a gleeful contrarian who builds attacking, lopsided sides that confound opponents through sheer unpredictability. Brilliant and maddening in equal measure, his Sidewinders are never, ever boring.
manager.playing_history: A maverick attacking midfielder who never met a convention he liked.
manager.playing_philosophy: Attack from strange angles, overload the unexpected flank, and refuse to do what they expect. Predictability is the only sin.
manager.culture: A contrarian who prizes surprise above safety.

managing_staff.appearance: Wiry and restless, diagrams strange lateral runs in the air with his hands.
managing_staff.bio: Axis Tanaka specialises in lateral movement, drilling the sideways overloads and switches that make the Sidewinders so disorienting to mark.
managing_staff.playing_history: A wide player obsessed with movement off the ball.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Move them sideways until a hole opens. Defences can't track what they can't predict.
achievements: Built the side's disorienting lateral movement

players.appearance: Calm amid chaos, a keeper used to the unexpected.
players.bio: Tilt Vasquez is the balanced last line of a famously unpredictable side, unflappable when his own team's chaos leaves him exposed.

players.appearance: Tireless and willing, an unconventional full-back.
players.bio: Axis Torres is the workhorse defender who powers the lopsided overloads, popping up wherever he isn't expected.
achievements: Most attacking-third touches by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the rare orthodoxy at the back.
players.bio: Roll Kane is the team-first defender who tries to keep order behind the chaos, the anchor of a tilting side.

players.appearance: Combative and unpredictable, a defender with attacking urges.
players.bio: Spin Walker is the aggressive defender who can't resist joining the overload, thrilling and risky in equal measure.
achievements: Most defender goals in the side

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, the reader of the chaos.
players.bio: Orbit Rivera is the composed defender who tries to anticipate his own side's unpredictability, the calm at the back.

players.appearance: Inventive and unpredictable, the maddening genius.
players.bio: Slant Chen is the creative heart of the chaos, conjuring passes from impossible angles that even his teammates don't expect.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the order behind the chaos.
players.bio: Lean Petrov is the team-first midfielder who covers for the side's adventures, the unsung balance to the eccentricity.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the rare steady hand.
players.bio: Skew Morales is the composed midfielder who keeps the lopsided side from tipping fully into chaos.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Sharp and opportunistic, a finisher from odd angles.
players.bio: Lateral Park is the selfish finisher who thrives on the chaos, scoring from positions no orthodox striker would occupy.

players.appearance: Direct and combative, the cutting edge of the overload.
players.bio: Sideways Kim is the aggressive forward who attacks from wherever the overload sends him, impossible to mark.

players.appearance: Self-assured and inventive, the wide wild card.
players.bio: Tangent Okafor is the selfish wide forward who goes off-script at will, infuriating and electrifying in equal measure.
achievements: Most successful dribbles in the side

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Rotate Tanaka is the cautious veteran second keeper, a steady presence behind the unpredictable side.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Veer Nakamura is the team-first deputy who tries to keep order when the starters rest, a calming substitute.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Wobble Fischer is the promising young defender learning to read his own side's chaos, calm and quick to adapt.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Drift Hayashi is the creative deputy who fits the eccentric side perfectly, a youngster of unpredictable promise.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish flair.
players.bio: Deflect Sato is the eager young finisher pushing for a place, a selfish forward with a taste for the spectacular.
